name: Kahlua Eggnog Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake and cool the Chocolate Crumb Shell.
2. Stir together 2 tablespoons sugar, gelatin, salt, and nutmeg in a 2-quart saucepan.
3. Beat egg yolks.
4. Add milk and combine with dry mixture.
5. Cook over moderately low heat, stirring constantly, just until the mixture thickens.
6. Do not allow to boil. Remove from heat, cool, and stir in Kahlua. Chill a few minutes.
7. When the mixture begins to thicken, beat egg whites to fine foam.
8. Gradually beat in remaining 4 tablespoons sugar, making a meringue.
9. With the same beater, beat cream stiff.
10. Fold cream into gelatin mixture, then meringue.
11. If necessary, chill a few minutes until the mixture mounds on a spoon.
12. Turn into the cooked crust and chill for 4-5 hours or overnight.
13. At serving time, decorate with additional whipped cream and candied fruit, if desired.
14. Makes 1 9-inch pie (8 servings).
1. Mix together fine chocolate wafer crumbs, sugar, and melted butter.
2. Press over the bottom and up sides of a lightly greased 9-inch pie pan (1/2-inch deep).
3. Bake in a 350°F oven for 5-7 minutes.
4. Cool before filling.
